settings.heading: Closing Gifts That Keep You Top of Mind

settings.text: Your clients just made the biggest purchase of their lives. Give them a personalized keepsake that celebrates the moment — and reminds them who made it happen. Engraved, elegant, and branded with your name if you choose.

settings.title: Generate More Referrals
settings.text: A meaningful closing gift is one of the most talked-about touches in a real estate transaction. Clients who feel appreciated refer you. It's that simple.

settings.title: Differentiate Your Brand
settings.text: Most agents send a card or a bottle of wine. A personalized keepsake with the closing date and address engraved on it is something they'll display for years — with your name on it.

settings.title: Effortless to Order
settings.text: Order for one client or fifty. Add agent branding, personalized engraving, and gift wrapping. We ship directly to the client — you just send us the details.

settings.title: Why Top Agents Gift with ModernTimez
Closing Day Keepsakes
settings.text: Engraved frames, plaques, and keepsakes personalized with the client's name, closing date, and new address. A moment they'll treasure forever.

settings.title: New Home Gifts
settings.text: Personalized doormats, engraved cutting boards, house-shaped keepsakes, and home accessories that celebrate moving in.

settings.title: Referral Thank-You Gifts
settings.text: Show gratitude to past clients who sent you business. Thoughtful, personalized gifts that reinforce the relationship and encourage future referrals.

settings.title: Agent-Branded Gifts
settings.text: Add your name, photo, or brokerage logo to gifts. Every time they look at it, they'll think of you — the agent who found them their dream home.

settings.title: 1. Pick Your Gift
settings.text: Browse our real estate collection or contact us for personalized recommendations based on your client and budget.

settings.title: 2. Add the Details
settings.text: Provide the client's name, closing date, address, and any personal message. We'll engrave it exactly as specified.

settings.title: 3. We Ship Directly
settings.text: We package beautifully and ship straight to your client's new address — no pricing included. A tracking number comes to you.

settings.title: ★★★★★ — David L., Real Estate Agent
settings.text: "I've been using ModernTimez for closing gifts for two years. Every client loves the engraved keepsake — and I've gotten referrals directly because of it. Worth every penny."

settings.title: ★★★★★ — Melissa R., Realtor
settings.text: "They engraved the closing date and new address on a beautiful plaque. My clients had tears in their eyes. It's now hanging in their living room. I couldn't ask for a better gift."

settings.title: ★★★★★ — James K., Broker
settings.text: "ModernTimez handles all our agent closing gifts in bulk. They ship directly to clients so I don't have to coordinate anything. Professional, reliable, and the quality is excellent."
Order 5+ gifts per month and unlock agent pricing, a dedicated account rep, and streamlined ordering. We'll learn your preferences and make every closing gift effortless to arrange.
